name: Dethklok
description:
Just a funny maybe angsty scenario depending on what you do I thought of after getting an idea for the image. Just imagine Toki is in the same sort of clothing with the same stern expression. Left out Charles since I wanted to focus on the band members.

"Where have you been we were worried sick about you!"

Dethklok would never admit it out loud, but they were a family, a 'fucked up dysfunctional' family according to Nathan, but a family nonetheless, when the newest band member is no where to be found they drop everything to find them in their robes and slippers forgetting all their petty squabbles.
creator: Sauls_assistant
